# wristhomage

> Independent, spec-rich database of watch homages — affordable watches that pay homage to iconic designs (Submariner, Speedmaster, Datejust and more), each ranked by a published fidelity rubric.

## Watches
- [Royal Oak homages](https://wristhomage.com/watches/ap-royal-oak): 2 ranked homages of the Audemars Piguet Royal Oak
- [Fifty Fathoms homages](https://wristhomage.com/watches/blancpain-fifty-fathoms): 2 ranked homages of the Blancpain Fifty Fathoms
- [Tank Must homages](https://wristhomage.com/watches/cartier-tank): 2 ranked homages of the Cartier Tank Must
- [Seamaster Diver 300M homages](https://wristhomage.com/watches/omega-seamaster-300m): 2 ranked homages of the Omega Seamaster Diver 300M
- [Speedmaster Moonwatch homages](https://wristhomage.com/watches/omega-speedmaster): 3 ranked homages of the Omega Speedmaster Moonwatch
- [Nautilus homages](https://wristhomage.com/watches/patek-nautilus): 2 ranked homages of the Patek Philippe Nautilus
- [Datejust homages](https://wristhomage.com/watches/rolex-datejust): 3 ranked homages of the Rolex Datejust
- [Daytona homages](https://wristhomage.com/watches/rolex-daytona): 3 ranked homages of the Rolex Daytona
- [Explorer homages](https://wristhomage.com/watches/rolex-explorer): 3 ranked homages of the Rolex Explorer
- [GMT-Master II homages](https://wristhomage.com/watches/rolex-gmt-master-ii): 3 ranked homages of the Rolex GMT-Master II
- [Submariner homages](https://wristhomage.com/watches/rolex-submariner): 5 ranked homages of the Rolex Submariner
- [Black Bay 58 homages](https://wristhomage.com/watches/tudor-black-bay): 2 ranked homages of the Tudor Black Bay 58

## About
- [Scoring rubric](https://wristhomage.com/rubric)
- [Homage vs replica](https://wristhomage.com/articles/homage-vs-replica)
